name: Lemon Sponge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar and flour together in a bowl.
2. Add the lemon juice and rind to the dry ingredients. Beat in the egg yolks, butter, and salt until well combined.
3. Stir in the milk until the batter is smooth.
4. Beat the egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter using a spatula or wooden spoon.
6. Spoon the batter into greased custard cups or ramekins, filling them about 2/3 full.
7. Place the cups in a shallow pan and fill the pan with hot water, ensuring the water does not touch the cups.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. The sponge may also be baked in a pie shell if desired.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
